subject: Intermediary device for data message network routing (US 9,762,734)

dialog.body: Core patent of the TDC Bridge platform. Describes an intermediary device that receives data messages, uses a session management mechanism to identify a tuple from message and pre-existing session characteristics, and modifies the session accordingly for contact-center routing.

meta.notes: Application 15/411,321, filed 2017-01-20, issued 2017-09-12. Originally assigned via TEN DIGIT Communications LLC (Simsbury, CT). First in a family that includes US 11,146,517 and the Canadian grants CA 3,051,200 C and CA 3,051,201 A1.
